2605.10592.title: A Resilient Solution for Sewer Overflow Monitoring across Cloud and Edge
2605.10592.paper_summary: Aging combined sewer systems in many historical cities are increasingly stressed by extreme rainfall events, which can trigger combined sewer overflows (CSO) with significant environmental and public health impacts. Forecasting the filling dynamics of overflow basins is critical for anticipating capacity exceedance and enabling timely preventive actions for CSO. We present a web-based demonstrator (https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de) that integrates Deep Learning forecasting methods in both cloud and edge settings into an interactive monitoring dashboard for overflow monitoring, resilient to network outages. A video showcase is available online (https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ).
2605.10592.paper_summary_zh: 老化的合流污水系統在許多歷史城市中正受到極端降雨事件的日益壓力，這可能引發合流污水溢流（CSO），對環境和公共健康產生重大影響。預測溢流池的填充動態對於預測容量超過和及時採取預防措施以應對CSO至關重要。我們展示了一個基於網絡的演示器（https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de），該演示器將深度學習預測方法集成到雲端和邊緣環境中，形成一個互動式監控儀表板，用於溢流監測，能夠抵抗網絡故障。視頻展示可在線獲得（https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ）。
2605.10592.author: Vipin Singh et.al.
2605.10592.authors: Vipin Singh, Tianheng Ling, Peter Ghaly, Felix Grimmeisen, Gregor Schiele, Felix Biessmann
